回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 進階英文文法 (Advanced English Grammar)	開課班級 : 應英一年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 李盈興	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
- This course aims to familiarize students with fundamental and advanced English grammar in their actual practice of English proficiency capability in listening, reading, writing, and speaking. - Those who would like to participate in this course should fulfill the requirement of having attended the course of English Grammar.  


2.教學綱要
- The course is outlined as follows: Tenses and Aspects, Modal Verbs, Coordinating Conjunctions, Adverb Clauses, Connectives (Cause-and-Effect, Contrast, & Condition), and Conditional Sentences and Wishes. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Understanding and Using English Grammar (The Fifth
Edition). [英漢版：Azar英文法系列(進階)].　
出版日期 : 2019年 月 
作者 : Azar, B. S. & Hagen, S. A.　出版社 : Pearson Education Taiwan & Caves Books　版本 : 5 


4.參考書
1	書名 : Azar, B. S., Hagen, S. A., Tesh, G., & Koch, R. S.　出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : Understanding and Using English Grammar (The Fifth Edition).　出版社 : Pearson.　版本 :

作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :  

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations: Exams 60%; Reviews 20%; Participation 20%. 
Requirements: Students are required to prepare the weekly materials before they come to class. Students should participate in two exams (plus two reviews) to pass the course. The teacher will check the attendance; those who are absent or come late will lose 1 score from the final grades for each time. Students should also show respect to others in the class by not talking aloud, not wandering from the seats, and not surfing the Internet on their smartphones. They should understand and be responsible for their grades. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：高
